channel.title: Comments for page "Embracing The Angels"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "Embracing The Angels"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Between this and 3534, I'm kinda struggling to see the Fifthism in this Fifthist apocalypse, beyond the slathering of the number five everywhere. I hope this trend doesn't continue.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Most of the attendees were of those "January 5th and 5×5 Day only goers" types, that said they were Fifthists but really only went for the big holidays (but of course, all the while looking down on everyone else who did the same.)

This got a solid chuckle out of me.

Overall I love the slight Douglas Adams style narration to the piece, which brings a humor that is wonderfully juxtaposed to the horrors of a kaiju apocalypse.

+1.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
You had me at

these people who claimed the kaiju eating the world were their own angels

+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I love the bit about greed. That really hit the tone of Southern Baptist fifthist to me. Genuine faith and greed in one.

item.title: Doomcon
item.content:encoded:
This is the latest entry in Team Mikasa's Doomsday Contest Entries, following SCP-3534. This is about the end of the world from a certain perspective within that universe.

The middle div is meant to be a Southern Fifthist GoI format, but I felt that format is too short and doesn't provide enough depth, so I added a tale around it and made it represent the sermon.

Thanks to LordStonefish, not_a_seagull and GabrielJade for looking this over (as well as the rest of my team).

Attribution:

  • Background image is from here and under Creative Commons Attribution-Share Alike 2.0 Generic and edited by myself. Removed the image.
  • The Bible passages are from the New Standard Revised edition. The Genesis 7:11 quote has slight modifications.

If you liked this thing and would like to read some comments about it, or check out other things I've written, head to my author page for more!
